summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PashuVaani app - all features working correctly. Backend: 21/21 tests passed. Frontend: All UI tests passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: Home page with colored logo (no dark mode), Doctors page with 4 static doctors, Appointments page with weight unit selector (KG/LBS) and medical history popup, Blogs page with 3 seeded posts, Blog detail page, Footer component, About PashuVaani dropdown, Try Gopu.AI Free login dialog. Payment integration is MOCKED.

home_page.details: Colored logo displayed, no dark mode toggle, footer present

navbar.details: No dark mode toggle button, About PashuVaani dropdown works

doctors_page.details: 4 static doctors displayed with Consult with Doctor buttons

appointments_page.details: Weight input with KG/LBS unit selector, vaccination checkbox, medical history checkbox with popup

medical_history_popup.details: Popup opens when checkbox clicked, has textarea, Save and Cancel buttons work

blogs_page.details: 3 seeded blog posts displayed with Read More buttons

blog_detail_page.details: Blog content displayed, Back to Blogs button works

footer.details: Footer rendered at bottom with Quick Links, Company, Contact sections

try_gopu_button.details: Shows login dialog when not logged in

mocked_apis.payment_integration: Payment integration for subscriptions is MOCKED
